occurrence_sentence: Venture capital is currently focused on turning a quick buck, not long-term investments, according to MIT Sloan Management Review columnists.
Venture capital is currently focused on turning a quick buck, not long-term investments, according to MIT Sloan Management Review columnists.

Venture capital must return to its roots, taking on more significant risks to fund scientific and technological advancements that have the potential to deliver substantial returns and societal benefits, according to researchers writing an article in MIT Sloan Management Review.

Venture capital must return to its roots, taking on more significant risks to fund scientific and technological advancements that have the potential to deliver substantial returns and societal benefits, according to researchers writing an article in [MIT Sloan Management Review](https://sloanreview.mit.edu/article/radical-innovation-needs-old-school-vc/).

occurrence_sentence: With a several-decades long background in journalism and communications, Matt Swayne has worked as a science communicator for an R1 university for more than 12 years, specializing in translating high tech and deep tech for the general audience.
